metadata.description: Plugin distribution for the Multi-Agent Coordination Framework (MACF). Provides the macf-agent plugin with channel server, coordination skills, agent identity templates, and startup hooks.

plugins.name: macf-agent
plugins.description: Runtime component of MACF: MCP channel server with mTLS, five coordination skills (macf-status, macf-peers, macf-ping, macf-issues, macf-notify-peer), seven agent identity templates, SessionStart hooks (auto-pickup), and Stop hook (notify_peer per DR-023 UC-1; v0.2.21 simplifies notify_peer API by dropping the wake field — receiver discriminates wake-on-receipt by event type alone per macf#355).
